_comment: Zones from photo survey 2026-06-12. Rename/adjust areas to match reality. moisture_source flips to 'sensor:<id>' when hardware lands.

zones.name: Pepper bed (natural wood, poly sheet beside)
Tomato + basil + squash bed
zones.notes: Has chives clump; heavy volunteer/weed pressure; drip line visible in part

zones.name: Potato bed (grey wood)
zones.notes: Healthiest bed; drip line top corner

zones.name: Hoop tunnel bed (kale, garlic, salad greens)
zones.notes: Poly hoop = season extension into Nov; drip lines present

zones.name: Dense seedling bed (ID pending)
zones.notes: Wall-to-wall seedlings; crop vs weed unresolved

zones.name: Pot cluster (figs, blueberry, grape)
zones.notes: Pots dry FAST - near-daily water in July heat. First sensor should go here.
